  "findings": [
    "Minor cosmetic screw pops consistent with seasonal lumber shrinkage on a non-fire-rated interior partition."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform standard cosmetic touch-up (re-drive or add adjacent fastener, patch, and paint) as part of typical one-year builder warranty service."
  ],
  "rationale": "The original installation complied with the fastener spacing schedule and GA-216. Minor screw pops resulting from seasonal wood shrinkage in the first year are considered normal cosmetic settling rather than a structural or code-compliance failure.",

    "GA-216 Specifications for the Application and Finishing of Gypsum Panel Products",
    "ASTM C840 Standard Specification for Application and Finishing of Gypsum Board"
  ]
